calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235
Petitioner Jin Lin Huang (mother) was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Zhi Qiang Huang, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jenny Yau, were placed under oath and examined.
Minor's father Lian Jin Zhu was not present, but consented and signed the petition to the name change.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Henry Q. Huang.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
